successCriteria: Players can complete one coverage status loop.

records.description: Economy reward fixture for the coverage portal encounter.
records.tuningNotes: Fixture reward mirrors content loot and source amount.

records.description: Economy offer fixture for content manifest and reward linking.

records.name: Coverage Delivery Scope
records.description: Defines the source-of-truth scope for an engine toolkit repository managed through VeritySpec records and GitHub workflow artifacts.
records.intent: Keep GitHub workflow execution aligned to VeritySpec product-contract truth.

records.name: Coverage Commercial Posture
records.description: Captures proprietary private-alpha posture without asserting external marketplace, legal, or privacy compliance.
constraints: do not publish package artifacts without release approval

records.name: GitHub Native Project Management
records.description: Uses GitHub Issues, Projects, Milestones, Actions, and pull requests for workflow while VeritySpec records hold product truth.
records.issuePolicy: Issues track work, decisions, questions, defects, readiness gaps, and evidence requests.
records.projectPolicy: GitHub Projects provide planning boards and portfolio execution views.
records.milestonePolicy: Milestones bound sprint, release, and candidate work.

records.name: GitHub Manages Workflow
records.description: Records the operating decision that GitHub manages workflow while VeritySpec manages truth.
records.decision: GitHub manages workflow and VeritySpec manages product-contract truth.
records.rationale: This keeps execution state and source-of-truth records explicit without duplicating workflow systems.

records.name: Coverage Readiness Profile
records.description: Defines internal readiness checks for a private alpha engine-tooling repository.

records.name: Coverage CI Evidence Requirement
records.description: Requires recorded local or hosted CI evidence before a private alpha release is treated as ready.

records.name: Tagged Alpha Release Process
records.description: Defines branch, tag, approval, and artifact rules for private alpha releases.
records.branchStrategy: feature branches merge through pull requests into main.
records.tagPolicy: Alpha releases use annotated version tags after local and hosted verification pass.
records.approvalPolicy: A maintainer reviews the release notes, changelog, roadmap, and generated artifacts.
records.artifactPolicy: Distribution artifacts are built from the release tag.

records.name: Maintained Toolkit Operations
records.description: Defines lightweight operational ownership for a maintained engine-tooling repository.
records.incidentPolicy: Release-blocking failures are tracked as defects and linked to readiness gaps.
records.monitoringPolicy: CI and local verification reports are reviewed before release.

records.name: Coverage Support Policy
records.description: Defines support expectations for private alpha users and maintainers.
records.responsePolicy: Release-blocking support issues are triaged before the next candidate.
records.escalationPolicy: Escalate defects that invalidate readiness evidence to the release owner.

records.name: Active Maintenance Policy
records.description: Defines dependency, compatibility, and update expectations while the toolkit is actively maintained.
records.updateCadence: Review dependencies and generated artifacts each release cycle.
records.dependencyPolicy: Update dependencies through pull requests with local verification evidence.
records.compatibilityPolicy: Breaking changes require changelog and migration notes.

records.name: Retained Source Archive Policy
records.description: Defines source, release, and generated-artifact archival expectations for the repository.
records.retentionPolicy: Retain tagged source, release notes, generated schemas, and verification summaries.

records.name: Sunset Decommission Policy
records.description: Defines the handoff and archival path if the toolkit is replaced or retired.
records.dataHandling: No production customer data is represented by this example workspace.
records.communicationPlan: Document replacement guidance in release notes and README.

records.name: Workspace Contract Scanner
records.description: Scans VeritySpec workspace records to find missing product-delivery coverage.

records.name: Agent Context Generator Capability
records.description: Generates bounded implementation context from product-delivery and readiness records.

records.name: Coverage CI Validation Runner
records.description: Runs local validation, lint, readiness, graph, and generation checks when hosted CI is unavailable.

records.name: Readiness Dashboard Surface
records.description: Represents an editor or dashboard surface for reviewing product-delivery readiness and evidence gaps.

records.name: Implementation Agent Context Exporter
records.description: Exports scoped product-delivery context for AI agents working in the repository.
records.privacyPolicy: Do not include secrets, credentials, or private customer data in exported context.
records.redactionPolicy: Exclude environment-specific secrets and unpublished commercial terms.

records.name: Coverage Soft Launch Release
records.description: Mobile release posture for a soft launch candidate without asserting store approval.

records.name: Coverage Store Listing
records.description: Draft listing metadata posture for iOS and Android stores.
records.notes: Listing metadata is reviewed internally before submission.

records.name: Coverage Privacy Policy
records.description: Privacy policy evidence reference for the mobile release posture.
records.dataUseSummary: Documents analytics, purchases, ads posture, and support data handling for review.

records.name: Apple Privacy Details
records.description: Apple privacy detail posture for review; not a store approval claim.

records.name: Google Play Data Safety
records.description: Google Play Data Safety posture for review; not a store approval claim.

records.name: ATT Consent Posture
records.description: ATT consent posture for the mobile release.
records.rationale: The example release does not declare cross-app tracking.

records.name: Mobile Coverage SDK Inventory
records.description: SDK inventory used to inform privacy and data-safety records.
records.dataCollectionNotes: SDK declarations are reviewed before launch-candidate readiness.

records.name: Mobile Coverage Monetization Posture
records.description: Ads and in-app-purchase posture for the soft launch.
records.notes: Pricing approval is tracked outside this example.

records.name: Remove Ads Entitlement
records.description: Remove Ads entitlement contract for IAP fulfillment posture.
records.restorePolicy: Restore purchases from store receipt state.

records.name: Canada Soft Launch
records.description: Soft launch posture for one market and explicit telemetry success criteria.

records.name: Soft Launch 0.5.0 Candidate
records.description: Launch-candidate readiness posture for soft launch build 0.5.0.

records.name: Mobile Coverage Compatibility Baseline
records.description: Compatibility posture for supported mobile platforms and device classes.
records.testPolicy: Smoke-test representative low, mid, and high memory devices before launch candidate.

records.name: Coverage LiveOps Config
records.description: Production liveops configuration contract for a mobile game.

records.name: Remote Config Bounds
records.description: Remote config key and bounds policy for live tuning.
records.boundsPolicy: Numeric values must stay within documented min/max ranges.
records.deploymentPolicy: Stage remote config before production rollout.

records.name: Remote Config Rollback
records.description: Rollback posture for live remote config changes.
records.rollbackTrigger: retention, crash, or purchase anomaly after rollout

records.name: LiveOps Analytics Taxonomy
records.description: Event and KPI taxonomy for liveops decisions.

records.name: Purchase Issue Support
records.description: Support category for IAP and entitlement issues.
records.responsePolicy: Triage purchase issues before the next liveops review window.

records.name: Profile Save Migration v2
records.description: Save migration posture for player profile schema v2.
records.migrationPolicy: Migrate profile records on first launch after update.
records.rollbackPolicy: Keep v1 parser until v2 migration evidence is complete.

records.name: LiveOps Sunset Plan
records.description: Sunset posture for liveops services and player communications.
records.communicationPlan: Publish support notice and in-app message before disabling liveops services.
records.supportHandoff: Support keeps known issue responses available through archive window.

records.name: Player Request Data Deletion
records.description: Data deletion handling posture for player requests.
records.retentionPolicy: Retain only records required by support and platform policy during the documented window.
records.deletionMethod: Submit verified deletion request through operations queue.

records.name: LiveOps Archive Handling
records.description: Archive handling posture for final liveops artifacts.
records.artifactPolicy: Archive final config snapshots, analytics taxonomy, and support policies.
